project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Continue hand-jarring to safety valve with 4.65 GC. Injecting the well for ~1 hour every 30ft of hand jarring due to continual packing off of debris. Reached 1700ft at shift change. Latest lookahead has tonight 21:00 for rig up MFC if all goes to plan.
